gold.title: Floating Nav
gold.reason: Animated floating navigation bar with framer-motion, icon-based items, and a modern pill/island design — immediately elevates any landing page or marketing site.

gold.title: Futuristic Nav
gold.reason: Sleek futuristic navbar with framer-motion transitions and labelled icon nav items — highly distinctive and visually striking for modern product sites.

gold.title: Hover Gradient Nav Bar
gold.reason: Gradient hover effects on navigation items with smooth framer-motion variants — polished and immediately usable as a site-level header.

gold.title: Mega Menu
gold.reason: Animated mega-menu with AnimatePresence, sub-menus, and a structured multi-column dropdown — essential for content-rich marketing or e-commerce sites.

gold.title: Glow Menu
gold.reason: Glowing animated nav items with framer-motion and theme support — visually stunning and perfect for dark-mode-first product or SaaS websites.

gold.title: Promote Header
gold.reason: Full-featured site header with path-aware active states, resource dropdowns, and Next.js Link integration — production-ready top nav for real customer websites.

gold.title: Slide Tabs
gold.reason: Smooth sliding indicator tab navigation using framer-motion layout animation — clean, modern, and ideal as a section or page-level nav component.

gold.title: Animated Menu
gold.reason: Rive-animated icons with framer-motion transitions — premium feel using vector animation for nav icons, highly distinctive for top-tier redesigns.

gold.title: Bottom Menu
gold.reason: Polished animated bottom navigation bar with AnimatePresence and SVG icons — excellent for mobile-first sites and modern app-like web experiences.

gold.title: Radial Social Menu
gold.reason: Unique radial/circular expanding social menu — eye-catching and memorable, great for portfolio or personal brand sites needing a distinctive nav gesture.

silver.title: Animated Menu 1
silver.reason: Full-screen animated menu overlay with framer-motion, dark/light toggle, and icon links — functional and attractive but more complex to adapt to generic sites.

silver.title: Animated Menu
silver.reason: Clean motion/react-powered collapsible menu with container ref — solid animated nav but relatively minimal in visual design.

silver.title: Menu Vertical
silver.reason: Animated vertical link list with skew and motion effects — clean and reusable as a side or footer nav, good quality but less visually bold.

silver.title: Navbar
silver.reason: Feature-rich navbar with accordion mobile menu, icons, and multi-section structure — comprehensive but slightly complex; good silver-tier site header.

silver.title: Mac Os Menu Bar
silver.reason: Detailed macOS-style menu bar with submenus and keyboard shortcuts — creative and polished, but niche styling limits broad website applicability.

silver.title: Menu Hover Effects
silver.reason: Responsive horizontal nav with hover animations and mobile toggle — clean and functional but straightforward, no standout visual innovation.

silver.title: Menu
silver.reason: Framer-motion animated menu with ChevronRight indicators and clean prop API — solid utility component, good for dropdowns but not a headline nav.

silver.title: Circle Menu
silver.reason: Animated circular expanding menu with AnimatePresence — creative interaction pattern, good for portfolios and creative sites, moderately distinctive.

silver.title: Flower Menu
silver.reason: Radial flower-petal expanding icon menu — novel interaction but very stylised, works best as a floating action button rather than primary site nav.

silver.title: Bottom Menu
silver.reason: Animated bottom nav with HugeIcons and smooth transitions — well-built for mobile nav but dependent on a paid icon library, limiting drop-in usability.

silver.title: Navigation Menu
silver.reason: Radix-UI navigation menu with cva variants and dropdown support — robust and accessible, clean but visually standard.

silver.title: Navigation Menu 1
silver.reason: Base-UI navigation menu with CVA variants — accessible and well-structured, similar quality to shadcn patterns, functional but not visually distinctive.

silver.title: App Menu Bar
silver.reason: Desktop-app-style menubar with nested submenus using shadcn Menubar — clean and well-composed, but primarily suited to app UIs rather than marketing sites.

silver.title: Tabs in Cell for Navigation
silver.reason: ScrollArea-wrapped tabs for navigation — functional and neat, but a utility pattern rather than a visually distinctive nav component.

bronze.title: Menu 1
bronze.reason: Ant Design Menu component — tightly coupled to the antd library and visual system, not suitable for independent website redesign use.

bronze.title: Context Menu 1
bronze.reason: Right-click context menu — purely a utility/app interaction pattern, not applicable as a website navigation component.

bronze.title: Menubar 1
bronze.reason: Base-UI menubar primitive — a low-level building block without styling, more of a headless utility than a ready-to-use site nav.

bronze.title: Toolbar
bronze.reason: Text editor toolbar with formatting buttons — internal app UI for rich text editors, not a website navigation component.

bronze.title: Menu 1
bronze.reason: Aria-based menu primitives wrapping headless components — low-level building block, no visual identity, not ready for site nav use.

bronze.title: Menu Item Card
bronze.reason: Restaurant/food menu item card with clock icon — domain-specific UI card, not a navigation component for website redesign.

bronze.title: Nested Dashboard Menu
bronze.reason: Deep nested dashboard menubar with sub-menus for app navigation — too app/dashboard-specific, poor fit for marketing or informational website nav.

bronze.title: Sidebar Showcase
bronze.reason: A showcase/demo wrapper for sidebar components — not a standalone nav component, purely a presentation utility.

bronze.title: Base Menu
bronze.reason: Headless Base-UI menu primitives — unstyled low-level component, requires significant work before being usable as real site navigation.

bronze.title: Menu
bronze.reason: Ark-UI menu with grouped items — library-coupled and unstyled, a primitive building block rather than a polished site nav.

bronze.title: Menu Toggle Icon
bronze.reason: Hamburger/toggle icon only — a single micro-interaction element, not a complete navigation component.
